entry.title: IDC H9500110D0001 (P00030) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SPACE & MISSION SYSTEMS CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS CONTRACT IS TO PROVIDE THE MDA AND DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE (DOD) WITH ENTERPRISE-LEVEL TECHNICAL INTEGRATION AND BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM (BMDS)-LEVEL OPERATIONAL INTEGRATION PRODUCTS AND SERVICES; SUPPORT THE DEFINITION, DEVELOPMENT, AND TEST AND EVALUATION OF INTEGRATED MISSILE DEFENSE CAPABILITIES; SUPPORT WARFIGHTERS IN THE EXERCISE OF MISSILE DEFENSE READINESS, WARGAME COMMAND AND CONTROL PROCEDURES, OPERATIONAL CONCEPTS, AND DOCTRINAL REQUIREMENTS; AND PROVIDE OPERATIONAL SUPPORT TO THE BMDS. THIS MODIFICATION UPDATES ATTACHMENT 5, PROPERTY LIST

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (APPLIED RESEARCH/EXPLORATORY DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorName: NORTHROP GRUMMAN SPACE & MISSION SYSTEMS CORP.

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: NORTHROP GRUMMAN SPACE & MISSION SYSTEMS CORP.

ns1:vendor.ns1:contractorName: NORTHROP GRUMMAN SPACE & MISSION SYSTEMS CORP.

entry.title: IDC H9500110D0001 (P00031) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SPACE & MISSION SYSTEMS CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS CONTRACT IS TO PROVIDE THE MDA AND DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE (DOD) WITH ENTERPRISE-LEVEL TECHNICAL INTEGRATION AND BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM (BMDS)-LEVEL OPERATIONAL INTEGRATION PRODUCTS AND SERVICES; SUPPORT THE DEFINITION, DEVELOPMENT, AND TEST AND EVALUATION OF INTEGRATED MISSILE DEFENSE CAPABILITIES; SUPPORT WARFIGHTERS IN THE EXERCISE OF MISSILE DEFENSE READINESS, WARGAME COMMAND AND CONTROL PROCEDURES, OPERATIONAL CONCEPTS, AND DOCTRINAL REQUIREMENTS; AND PROVIDE OPERATIONAL SUPPORT TO THE BMDS. THIS ACTION ADDS DFAR 252.204-7012.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (APPLIED RESEARCH/EXPLORATORY DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS CONTRACT IS TO PROVIDE THE MDA AND DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE (DOD) WITH ENTERPRISE-LEVEL TECHNICAL INTEGRATION AND BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM (BMDS)-LEVEL OPERATIONAL INTEGRATION PRODUCTS AND SERVICES; SUPPORT THE DEFINITION, DEVELOPMENT, AND TEST AND EVALUATION OF INTEGRATED MISSILE DEFENSE CAPABILITIES; SUPPORT WARFIGHTERS IN THE EXERCISE OF MISSILE DEFENSE READINESS, WARGAME COMMAND AND CONTROL PROCEDURES, OPERATIONAL CONCEPTS, AND DOCTRINAL REQUIREMENTS; AND PROVIDE OPERATIONAL SUPPORT TO THE BMDS. ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS CONTRACT IS TO PROVIDE THE MDA AND DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE (DOD) WITH ENTERPRISE-LEVEL TECHNICAL INTEGRATION AND BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM (BMDS)-LEVEL OPERATIONAL INTEGRATION PRODUCTS AND SERVICES; SUPPORT THE DEFINITION, DEVELOPMENT, AND TEST AND EVALUATION OF INTEGRATED MISSILE DEFENSE CAPABILITIES; SUPPORT WARFIGHTERS IN THE EXERCISE OF MISSILE DEFENSE READINESS, WARGAME COMMAND AND CONTROL PROCEDURES, OPERATIONAL CONCEPTS, AND DOCTRINAL REQUIREMENTS; AND PROVIDE OPERATIONAL SUPPORT TO THE BMDS. THIS ACTION WILL UPDATE THE MDA DODAAC THAT TOOK PLACE ON OCT 1, 2016.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS CONTRACT IS TO PROVIDE THE MDA AND DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE (DOD) WITH ENTERPRISE-LEVEL TECHNICAL INTEGRATION AND BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM (BMDS)-LEVEL OPERATIONAL INTEGRATION PRODUCTS AND SERVICES; SUPPORT THE DEFINITION, DEVELOPMENT, AND TEST AND EVALUATION OF INTEGRATED MISSILE DEFENSE CAPABILITIES; SUPPORT WARFIGHTERS IN THE EXERCISE OF MISSILE DEFENSE READINESS, WARGAME COMMAND AND CONTROL PROCEDURES, OPERATIONAL CONCEPTS, AND DOCTRINAL REQUIREMENTS; AND PROVIDE OPERATIONAL SUPPORT TO THE BMDS. THIS MODIFICATION WILL EXTEND AND RAISE THE ESTIMATED MAXIMUM OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS CONTRACT IS TO PROVIDE THE MDA AND DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE (DOD) WITH ENTERPRISE-LEVEL TECHNICAL INTEGRATION AND BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM (BMDS)-LEVEL OPERATIONAL INTEGRATION PRODUCTS AND SERVICES; SUPPORT THE DEFINITION, DEVELOPMENT, AND TEST AND EVALUATION OF INTEGRATED MISSILE DEFENSE CAPABILITIES; SUPPORT WARFIGHTERS IN THE EXERCISE OF MISSILE DEFENSE READINESS, WARGAME COMMAND AND CONTROL PROCEDURES, OPERATIONAL CONCEPTS, AND DOCTRINAL REQUIREMENTS; AND PROVIDE OPERATIONAL SUPPORT TO THE BMDS. THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE AN UPDATED DD254.
